infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to check you in at nearby places.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: We use your background location to automatically check you in at nearby places.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: We use your background location to automatically check you in at nearby places.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TigerBus to use your location to check you in at nearby places.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow TigerBus to use your background location for automatic check-ins.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow TigerBus to use your location to find nearby places.
